description.p: Patchy is a fast raster image editor built around the Photoshop PSD format: layers, folders, masks, adjustment layers, layer styles, and text layers round-trip with Photoshop. It ships Photoshop-style tools (marquee, lasso, magnetic lasso, magic wand, quick select, brushes with .abr import and dynamics, clone, smudge, gradients), palette-constrained indexed-color editing for pixel artists, and exact indexed PNG-8/BMP export.
